data.title: Estee Lauder Cos Unusual Options Activity For October 22
Upstart Hldgs Options Trading: A Deep Dive into Market Sentiment
Sherwin-Williams Q3: Strong Paint Store Sales Dampened By Weak Consumer Demand, Guides Sluggish Q4 Sales
data.description: Sherwin-Williams Company reported lower Q3 results, missing analyst estimates for EPS and sales. Quarterly revenue rose 0.7% to $6.16B, driven by Paint Stores growth and acquisition impact, but offset by lower sales in Consumer Brands and Performance Coatings. Q4 outlook is flat to low-single-digit growth. 2024 adjusted EPS guidance reaffirmed.

data.title: 'Release Elon Musk On The Federal Government!' Kevin O'Leary Backs Musk's Cost-Cutting Power
Fiserv Earnings Enjoy 24% Boost, Raises 2024 Outlook On Heels Of DoorDash Partnership
data.description: Fiserv reported organic revenue grew 15% and adjusted operating margin increased after a partnership with DoorDash was announced.
